name: Emergency Rescue (High-Contrast Moral Trap)
logic_steps: Cold Open (0-2s): Use a 'Cold Palette' (blue/grey) showing a vulnerable character shivering. Contrast with a 'Warm Goal' (fire/house).
Choice Crisis: Offer three tools. The visual cursor must hover over the correct tool but eventually drag the 'disastrously wrong' one (e.g., using a bucket of ice to put out a fire).
Escalation: The character's state must visibly worsen (turning into an ice block or crying).
The Interruption: Cut to CTA at the peak of the character's distress with text: 'Only YOU can save them'.
visual_style: High color contrast. Blue vs. Orange. Sad facial expressions using Live2D or exaggerated 3D animations.
kpi_focus: CTR (High) & CVR (Mid-High). Best for Casual/Simulation games.
